name: Booking Agent (ADK)
description: Schedules onboarding tasks (orientation, training) and equipment deliveries (laptop, phone, monitor) for new employees. Built with Google ADK.

skills.name: Schedule Onboarding Task
skills.description: Schedule an orientation, training, or other onboarding session for an employee

skills.name: Schedule Equipment Delivery
skills.description: Schedule delivery of a laptop, phone, monitor or other equipment to an employee

skills.name: List Scheduled Tasks
skills.description: List all scheduled onboarding tasks, optionally filtered by employee

skills.name: List Scheduled Deliveries
skills.description: List all scheduled equipment deliveries, optionally filtered by employee
